sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22262" key="glaukoxai/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γλαυκο-χαίτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n22262.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with greyish hair</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mane</tr_>, Choerob.in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cod. Barocc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">50f</biblScope></bibl>.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">200</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
